---
id: get-version
title: "Get a version"
description: "Returns the version metadata and the file content at that version."
sidebar_label: "Get a version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/apis-tools/hub-api-sm/specifications/hub-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a version"}
></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/versions/{versionKey}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Returns the version metadata and the file content at that version.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: "versionKey",
      in: "path",
      required: true,
      description: "The unique key of the version.",
      schema: { type: "string" },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={"Body"} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "The version was found.",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            description: "A version with its full metadata and file content.",
            example: {
              versionKey: "ver-345-jkl",
              name: "Release 1.0",
              description: "First stable release of the order process.",
              fileKey: "file-789-xyz",
              organizationPublic: false,
              created: "2025-03-15T10:30:00.000Z",
              createdBy: { name: "Jane Doe", email: "jane.doe@example.com" },
              updated: "2025-03-15T10:30:00.000Z",
              updatedBy: { name: "Jane Doe", email: "jane.doe@example.com" },
              content: "<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>...",
            },
            required: [
              "versionKey",
              "name",
              "description",
              "fileKey",
              "created",
              "createdBy",
              "updated",
              "updatedBy",
              "organizationPublic",
              "content",
            ],
            properties: {
              versionKey: {
                description: "The unique key of the version.",
                type: "string",
              },
              name: { description: "The name of the version.", type: "string" },
              description: {
                description: "The description of the version.",
                type: "string",
                nullable: true,
              },
              fileKey: {
                description: "The key of the file this version belongs to.",
                type: "string",
              },
              organizationPublic: {
                description:
                  "Whether the version is published to shared resources.",
                type: "boolean",
              },
              created: {
                description: "The timestamp when the version was created.",
                type: "string",
                format: "date-time",
              },
              createdBy: {
                description:
                  "The user who created the version. May be null for legacy or system-created versions.",
                nullable: true,
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    description: "A reference to a user.",
                    required: ["name", "email"],
                    properties: {
                      name: {
                        description: "The display name of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                      },
                      email: {
                        description: "The email address of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                        format: "email",
                      },
                    },
                    title: "UserReference",
                  },
                ],
              },
              updated: {
                description: "The timestamp when the version was last updated.",
                type: "string",
                format: "date-time",
              },
              updatedBy: {
                description:
                  "The user who last updated the version. May be null for legacy or system-created versions.",
                nullable: true,
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    description: "A reference to a user.",
                    required: ["name", "email"],
                    properties: {
                      name: {
                        description: "The display name of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                      },
                      email: {
                        description: "The email address of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                        format: "email",
                      },
                    },
                    title: "UserReference",
                  },
                ],
              },
              content: {
                description: "The file content at this version.",
                type: "string",
              },
            },
            title: "VersionDetailResult",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "401": {
      description: "The request lacks valid authentication credentials.",
      headers: { "WWW-Authenticate": { schema: { type: "string" } } },
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Unauthorized",
            status: 401,
            detail:
              "The supplied authentication is not authorized to access this resource.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "403": {
      description: "Forbidden. The request is not allowed.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Forbidden",
            status: 403,
            detail:
              "Operation not allowed. Ensure your API credentials have the required permissions.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files/file-789-xyz",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "404": {
      description: "The requested resource was not found.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Not Found",
            status: 404,
            detail: "The requested resource was not found.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files/file-789-xyz",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "An internal error occurred while processing the request.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Internal Server Error",
            status: 500,
            detail:
              "An unexpected error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
